landing.heroTitle: Your rents, receipts and repairs ready before tax season
landing.heroCopy: A simple workspace to file rent, deposits, repairs, invoices, receipts and leases by property, room, tenant and month.
landing.proof: Built for 1 to 5 properties, shared flats and furnished rentals.
landing.painTitle: Replace the Excel + Drive + inbox chaos
landing.painCopy: Find missing receipts before tax season, not during it.
